feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)

entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,465Chapters: 14/25Kudos: 104

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. I have cleaned up the tags also so its not as confusing for new readers and will update every few months.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,920Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 8

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I hugged you tight as you were crumpling down, as I have found your loneliness
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,175Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: He has nothing: no family, no friends, no wealth, and no reputation. His so-called 'life' before the shooting is just full of selfish people who just want to take and take until he is stretched thin to the point of no return. What sort of life is that? But is the alternative right now any better? Being a slut for a man who sees him as nothing more than a hole to stuff his sperm into? Apparently it is, because Ric is still here, letting the bastard do whatever the fuck he wants.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,547Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.   (Guys I'm a child and I'm broke, I can't pay for comics or art. If you want to gift art, I'd be very happy to take it, and I also do art trades, but I cannot pay for services. Thank you.)

entry.title: All the stars are closer
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,686Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: This behaviour showed up more than once; apparently, Jason stumbled upon something he later discovered was called 'subspace'. It had been Kori who told him that, explaining that Dick tended to slip into subspace when he felt safe and when the person beside him had full control of the situation.Jason wasn't an expert in the subject, mostly because he never really had anyone to try this stuff with; he didn't really need it. Or that was what he had thought some moments ago. Now, he had apparently become the caretaker of someone who used subspace as a way of… Coping.

entry.title: sweet sweet slumber
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: He'd just about settled when he felt Jason's hands exploring him, leaning slightly into the touch as Jason's hands roamed absent mindedly. In his tired stupor, Dick couldn't help but notice Jason's hard on. It had been nestled in the small of Dick's back while Jason had his hands exploring. There's a slight shuffle and the sound of ruffling through a drawer in the nightstand that had Dick aware of exactly what Jason had been doing. The flip of a cap helped cement it as well. or: day two - somnophilia

entry.title: You've Got My Body, Flesh, and Bone
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,477Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: "I will kill for you." The Talon's voice was still not quite human as it rang through Jason's mind, Jason's would-be attacker dangling precariously from the Talon's grip on his ankle."Please don't." Jason answered aloud, hating that his motivations for the plea were more self-serving than attempts at mercy. If something happened to this guy, Bruce might have questions that Jason wouldn't know how to begin answering."As you wish it, little wing," The Talon trilled tossing the man aside carelessly before spreading his wings and lithely launching up beyond where the city lights of Gotham could reach him.Until next time.ORJason's been trained by the best supernatural hunter Gotham's ever known, but there's one Talon he can't bring himself to do anything about even as they keep coming face to face over the years.For GGH JayDick Week prompts:hunter! Jason x magical creature! Dick"I will kill for you." -"Please don't."

entry.title: But you know it ain't the real cherry
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,249Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: With the bitter reminder that he was just a man and, by consequence, very much weak to Dick Grayson's existence, Jason was also reminded of the fact that he had, indeed, a spank bank of memories about his supposed-to-be older brother.And now he had a Nightwing-themed fleshlight in his hands, with an ad that promoted the tool to be "just as tight and soft as the real thing". How did the people making this toy know that? Jason didn't want to know; he was fairly sure that his brother hadn't gone through a whole process of making a fleshlight of his own ass, so maybe people were just attracted by the thought of it being true.Either way, there was a big issue now: he had a Nightwing-themed sex toy in his house, and he didn't want to give it to any of Dick's friends because what if they actually enjoyed it? What if they managed to actually get closer to Dick enough that they could fuck him?
